mapper.insert: insert into aiw_investment_analysis_report (biz_id, request_id, provider_code, model_code, market_scope, theme_code, theme_name, status, confidence_level, data_quality_score, data_quality_gate, investment_summary, trend, investment_plan, simulated_return, chart_payload, prompt_snapshot, failure_reason, generated_at, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{requestId}, #{providerCode}, #{modelCode}, #{marketScope}, #{themeCode}, #{themeName}, #{status}, #{confidenceLevel}, #{dataQualityScore}, #{dataQualityGate}, #{investmentSummary}, #{trend}, #{investmentPlan}, #{simulatedReturn}, #{chartPayload}, #{promptSnapshot}, #{failureReason}, #{generatedAt}, #{createdAt})
